# MuleSoft MQ

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of MQ documentation.
> See [MQ llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/llms-full.txt) for all the MQ documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint MQ Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/index.md)
- [Setting Up the Environment and Access Permissions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-access-management.md)
- [Anypoint MQ REST APIs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-apis.md)
- [Accessing Anypoint MQ Audit Logs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-audit-logs.md)
- [Configuring Client Apps](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-client-apps.md)
- [Configuring Anypoint MQ](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-configure.md)
- [Configuring Connected Apps](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-connected-apps.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Connectors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-connectors.md)
- [Sending Messages to Multiple Queues Using Message Exchanges](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-exchanges.md)
- [Configuring Cross-Region Failover for Standard Queues](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-failover.md)
- [FAQ: Anypoint MQ](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-faq.md)
- [Getting Started with Anypoint MQ](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-get-started.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Glossary](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-glossary.md)
- [Monitoring Anypoint MQ](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-monitoring.md)
- [Configuring and Using Queues](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-queues.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-release-notes.md)
- [Route Messages by Configuring Rules on Message Exchanges](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-routing-rules.md)
- [Tutorial: Create a Queue and Send Messages to It](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-tutorial.md)
- [Viewing Anypoint MQ Usage Data](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mq/mq-usage.md)
